name: LENSAR, Inc.
business: We are a commercial-stage medical device company focused on designing, developing and marketing advanced laser systems for the treatment of cataracts and the management of pre-existing or surgically induced corneal astigmatism. Our current systems include the LENSAR Laser System (LLS) and the ALLY Robotic Cataract Laser System. We sell our products through a direct sales organization in the United States and third-party distributors in Europe and Asia.

exposures.sentence: We are a commercial-stage medical device company focused on designing, developing and marketing advanced laser systems for the treatment of cataracts and the management of pre-existing or surgically induced corneal astigmatism.

Our ALLY System is designed to combine our current core laser technology features with enhanced capabilities into a single small unit that allows surgeons to perform a robotic laser assisted cataract procedure in an operating room.

We use AI Technologies in our ALLY System to register and analyze patients eyes and determine eye surface and cataract density, which is designed to helps optimize laser patterns and energy settings in cataract procedures, with the goal of minimizing the overall energy delivered in the eye for quicker visual recovery and better patient outcomes.

catalysts.event: Priority Credit Line Agreement entered into with Wells Fargo Bank
catalysts.sentence: On March 11, 2026, the Company entered into a Priority Credit Line Agreement (the PCL Agreement), by and between the Company and Wells Fargo Bank, N.A ( Wells Fargo ).

catalysts.event: Reduction of acquisition-related costs and accounts payable by approximately $4.3 million
catalysts.sentence: During the three months ending March 31, 2026, the Company will reduce acquisition-related costs and accounts payable by approximately $4.3 million.

catalysts.event: Reclassification of $5.0 million of accounts payable from current to long-term
catalysts.sentence: During the three months ending March 31, 2026, $5.0 million of accounts payable will be reclassified from current to long-term based upon extended payment terms provided by our acquisition advisers.

tamClaims.claim: Global cataract surgery procedures expected to grow from 33.1 million in 2025 to 39.6 million in 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the 2025 Cataract Surgical Equipment Market Report, global estimated cataract surgery and refractive lens exchange surgical procedures (cataract surgery) are expected to grow from 33.1 million in 2025 to 39.6 million in 2030.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. cataract surgery procedures expected to increase from 5.1 million in 2025 to 5.9 million in 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, cataract surgery is expected to increase from almost 5.1 million procedures in 2025 to approximately 5.9 million in 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Global laser cataract procedures expected to grow from 1 million in 2025 to 1.2 million in 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, only 1 million of the global cataract surgeries were performed using a laser. This is expected to grow to an estimated 1.2 million of the global cataract procedures in 2030.
